title: Fix: Use absolute path to WSL binary to create ssh keys for `machine init` on Windows (Issue #14416)
body:
Fixes #14416 

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
- Fix: #14416 : `machine init` fails when ran from C:\Windows\System32 on Windows
```

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body: @Clivar first off good catch, and thank you for the PR. Review coming
@Clivar looks good, can you push an amended commit that is signed (git commit -s --amend), we need that pass DCO
@Clivar also, can you change the commit message to reflect the fix approach? (just so people aren't confused by the history) thanks!
